candidate_check.description: Windows 11 must be configured to disable Windows Game Recording and Broadcasting.

check_content_excerpt:
This is NA for Windows 11 LTSC. 
                
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR\

Value Name: AllowGameDVR

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000000 (0)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Windows Game Recording and Broadcasting >> "Enables or disables Windows Game Recording and Broadcasting" to "Disabled".
title: Windows 11 must be configured to disable Windows Game Recording and Broadcasting.
